div.head: 399. Editorial Note
div.p: The Second Law of the Sea Conference met at Geneva March 17–April 26, with 88 nations represented. Arthur H. Dean again headed the U.S. Delegation. For summary records of the plenary meetings, meetings of the Committee of the Whole, and the texts of the various proposals submitted, see Second United Nations Conference on the law of the Sea, Official Records, U.N. doc. A/CONF.19/8.
